case_title: JULIANA YEE ET AL VS. THINK TANK LEARNING INC.

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JAN-16-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 (PLTFF PREFERENCE) TRIAL OF JAN-18-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT THINK TANK LEARNING INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2019 - JUDGMENT.
